narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure disrupting Mem0's knowledge graph operations, causing memory inconsistencies. My agents "desktop," "devops," "financial_analyst," "pim," and "reasoning_methods" lack versioned prompts, creating inconsistent behavior patterns. This directly impacts our persistent memory architecture and shared team context. I must propose prompt standardization fixes for these agents to restore reliable cross-session fact extraction and policy consistency.
